rulings.Case Title: **TRANSFERRED TO SAN MATEO COUNTY** CONSERVATORSHIP OF RHEA THOMPSON
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION TO TRANSFER to SAN MATEO County
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 160 225 4765 and password 514879. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and key in meeting ID "160 225 4765#", then participant ID "0#", then password "514879#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Please review LRSF 14.1(C) for more information.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF ROBERT BENJAMIN CROSBY
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, Appointment Under IAEA
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required, as the following issues (last updated and e-mailed to counsel on 10/22/2025) remain unaddressed: 1) Published notice did not disclose the decedent's aka "Bob Crosby". All names the decedent was known by and listed at item 1 of the DE-121 form must be published. 2) A THIRD verified supplement must be filed to confirm that: i) Luellen's apartment number is 315. Her last name is Lesho. ii) Kyle Crosby's zip code is 14519. iii) Shane Crosby's street address is 359 Cortland Drive. iv) Mary's last name is [Huizinga or Huzinga or Huizina or Crosby]. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 160 225 4765 and password 514879. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and key in meeting ID "160 225 4765#", then participant ID "0#", then password "514879#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Please review LRSF 14.1(C) for more information.
